song.title: Made Free! Made Free!
song.lyrics:
[V1] 1) Made free! Made free! O captive! Bound by the law of sin, The law of life in Spirit Will quicken you within.|| And counting on the Spirit, His life shall now control T he members of your body, The portals of your soul.
[V2] 2) Made free! Made free in Jesus: For crucified with Him, From center to circumf’rence, He breaks the pow’r of sin.|| No longer act in body As if it had no “law”; His “law of life” must govern All that ran wild before.
[V3] 3) Made free! Made free in Jesus: Deep planted in His death, He liberates His life pow’r, And breathes His Spirit’s breath.|| Then waxing strong in spirit, With force of quick’ning life; The soul and body governed, Its members cease from strife!
[V4] 4) Made free! Made free in Jesus: Joined to the Risen One, By conflict prayer you triumph, And claim His vict’ry won.|| Freed with His glorious freedom, Above the darkness rife; For now the law of sin and death Is conquered by His life.
song.author: The Overcomer Magazine
